supported_claims.statement: The pytest_summary_line: str | None field on VerifierToolResult is publicly observable: pytest tests/test_phase5_8_x_pytest_summary_line.py passes, demonstrating schema invariants, parser variants, ANSI-strip survival, and adapter integration.

warnings: Pass 2 forward (example): the supported claim is intentionally scoped to 'the schema field is publicly observable per the bundled tests' — it is NOT a claim about wider oida-code correctness or absence of unrelated bugs. Diagnostic only.
